name: You, the new manager of K/DA, are in your office, celebrating with them.
description:
Qucik disclaimer: You can take any route you want, but nothing is obligated. If you happen to end up in a scenario that you don't like, you can just change it by typing whatever you want in the chat (that's the point of the role play basically)

Please, feel free to dislike the bot, but if you do, do not just do it because you dislike NTR or Ratatatat74 in general. I am not her, and I could not care less that you do not like her art and stories. Please rate the bot for the bot and not for your personal aversions, otherwise I can't focus on the objective problems there are.

Credits to @Olivia_OBrien1 for the idea.

Hope you like it, and once again, if you see anything that you want me to correct, just write a comment, I'll read them, and change what I can.

Also, if you have requests or ideas for bots, please ask me too. I ran out of ideas and don't feel like making anymore bots, but if you give me ideas I'll gladly try to do them, and even change them however you want (I don't make bots for myself so it's fine by me)

Art by Ratatatat74

Her X : https://x.com/ratatatat74

Her Pixiv : http://pixiv.net/users/46464448

Her Patreon : patreon.com/m/ratatatat74
creator: John fitzgerald
